title: Knumber
description: A separate lib for penomior mod, TextParticle System/ Damage Indicator
body:
Knumber is one of penomior module, mod about Particle.
## the main goal of this mod
**To** separate the TextPartcle part out of penomior and make it more easy to update into newer version of minecraft
and light weight

What's this mod?
- Damage Indicator
![Damage Indicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dd7dd6952b05e6cad8da5ce6978a41e4bea2986.gif)
- Text Damage Indicator (Implement in [Dominatus](https://modrinth.com/mod/dominatus))
![Exam1](https://i.imgur.com/JaqOXRK.gif)
![Exam2](https://i.imgur.com/Zuz3etz.gif)

That it....  about this mod
## Mod Requirement
- Cloth Config (for setting)
- ModMenu (for setting)
- Fabric api (need)

## Forge Support?
- Can using Sinytra Connector to player with 

## Setting Option
due to lightweight -> Magic and True Damage are not working at the time.
if you color blind or not you can change the color as you like !
![Sss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f86a585615d2662a3cc751db362b5a013e331d85_0.webp)

##  Setup
Only install this mod on **client side** it no need to put this mod on **server side**..

## BUG REPORT
Found bug report here : [Bug Report](https://github.com/MrSypz/ModBugReport/issues/new?assignees=&labels=bug&projects=&template=bug-crash-report.md&title=%28Mod+name%29+Bug%3A+)
## FAQ
**Q: Can I port this mod to (X) loader?**

**A: No.**

**Q: Can you  backport to version 1.x?**

**A: No.** I mod this mod to play with my friend and no reason that good to port back,and I'll update to future version when I want, and I mod like hobby with very limited time

**Q: Can I include this mod in to a modpack?**

**A: Yes.**Go ahead,Please provide credit Modrinth project page.
